label: Precipitation (annual)
na_meaning: NA when fewer than 10 valid monthly precip records that year (a partial year is dropped, not summed).

label: Mean temperature
na_meaning: NA when fewer than 8 valid monthly temp records, or the within-site MAD outlier filter NA'd a corrupted-sensor year.

label: Winter rain (Oct–Mar)
na_meaning: NA when fewer than 5 of the 6 Oct-Mar months are present.

label: Monsoon rain (Jul–Sep)
na_meaning: NA when any of the 3 Jul-Sep months is missing.

label: Spring temperature
na_meaning: NA when the Mar-May months are not all present.

label: Green-up onset
na_meaning: NA in years with fewer than 5 tracked individuals (the onset gate), or no green-up phenophase observed.

label: Peak fruiting
na_meaning: NA at sites/months tracking no fruit, or months with fewer than 5 individuals (honestly NA at arid sites).

label: Plant richness
na_meaning: NA when the plant-diversity bundle has no plot data that year.

label: Introduced plant cover
na_meaning: NA when cover is unscored that year.

label: Small-mammal catch rate
na_meaning: NA when no trapping effort (deployed trap-nights) is recorded that year.

label: Small mammals (indiv.)
na_meaning: NA when no tagged-individual records that year.

label: Bird detection index
na_meaning: NA when no point-count that year (descriptive only; carries no prior).

label: Bird richness
na_meaning: NA when no point-count that year.

label: Mosquito activity
na_meaning: NA when no CO2 trap effort that year.

label: Mosquito richness
na_meaning: NA when no identified mosquito catch that year.

label: Culex share (WNV group)
na_meaning: NA when the catch is zero or unidentified to the Culex group.
